name: @pheem49/mint
description: A native Tauri desktop AI assistant with a Rust backend and React UI.

scripts.build:desktop:bundle: tauri build && mkdir -p target/release/mint-desktop-portable && cp target/release/mint-desktop target/release/mint-desktop-portable/mint-desktop && mkdir -p target/release/bundle/tar && tar -czf target/release/bundle/tar/mint-desktop.tar.gz -C target/release mint-desktop-portable && rm -rf target/release/mint-desktop-portable
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:cli
scripts.tauri:build: tauri build && mkdir -p target/release/mint-desktop-portable && cp target/release/mint-desktop target/release/mint-desktop-portable/mint-desktop && mkdir -p target/release/bundle/tar && tar -czf target/release/bundle/tar/mint-desktop.tar.gz -C target/release mint-desktop-portable && rm -rf target/release/mint-desktop-portable
scripts.package: tauri build && mkdir -p target/release/mint-desktop-portable && cp target/release/mint-desktop target/release/mint-desktop-portable/mint-desktop && mkdir -p target/release/bundle/tar && tar -czf target/release/bundle/tar/mint-desktop.tar.gz -C target/release mint-desktop-portable && rm -rf target/release/mint-desktop-portable
